project_request: Interactive prompt engineering workspace with multi-provider testing and version history.

questions.question: How should we abstract the multi-provider LLM API calls?
options: Direct SDK calls with if/else per provider
Use Vercel AI SDK which already abstracts providers
questions.answer: Adapter pattern with provider interface — gives us full control and easy testing

questions.question: Should responses be streamed or returned in bulk?
options: Streaming with option to wait for complete response
questions.answer: Streaming via SSE for real-time display, with final complete response stored

questions.question: How should version history and diffs be stored?
options: Full prompt text per version in database
Full text with computed diffs on read
questions.answer: Full text with computed diffs on read — simplest to implement, storage is cheap

questions.question: How should we handle token counting across different providers?
options: Provider-specific tokenizers with a fallback estimator
questions.answer: Provider-specific tokenizers with a fallback estimator
